words.name: Pencils
words.description:
An implement for writing or drawing with graphite.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'P' handshape (index and middle fingers extended).
2. Do a writting gesture in air.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'P' handshape (index and middle fingers extended). 2. Do a writting gesture in air

words.name: Pens
words.description:
An implement for writing or drawing with ink.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand to do the handwritting gesture.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand to do the handwritting gesture

words.name: Notebooks
words.description:
A book of blank paper for writing notes.
How to sign:
1. Make the letter 'N' Handshape.
2. Simulate the opening of a notebook using the 'N' Handshape.
words.howToSign:
1. Make the letter 'N' Handshape
2. Simulate the opening of a notebook using the 'N' Handshape

words.name: Folders
words.description:
A folding cover used to hold loose papers.
How to sign:
1. Make the letter 'F' Handshape.
2. Simulate the opening of a folder using the 'F' Handshape.
words.howToSign:
1. Make the letter 'F' Handshape
2. Simulate the opening of a folder using the 'F' Handshape

words.name: Chalk
words.description:
A soft, porous limestone used for writing or drawing.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant 'X' handshape (as a piece of chalk).
2. Do the writting gesture in air.
words.howToSign:
1. Use the dominant 'X' handshape (as a piece of chalk). 
2. Do the writting gesture in air

words.name: Erasers
words.description:
A piece of soft rubber or plastic used to remove marks.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant 'E' handshape.
2. Move/Rub the dominant hand across the non-dominant flat palm, simulating erasing.
words.howToSign:
1. Use the dominant 'E' handshape. 
2. Move/Rub the dominant hand across the non-dominant flat palm, simulating erasing.

words.name: Rulers
words.description:
A straight strip of material used for drawing straight lines or measuring.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant 'R' handshape.
2. Touch back forearm of the non-dominant hand.
3. Slide the dominant 'R' hadshape to simulate measuring.
words.howToSign:
1. Use the dominant 'R' handshape 
2. Touch back forearm of the non-dominant hand.
3. Slide the dominant 'R' hadshape to simulate measuring.

words.name: Glue sticks
words.description:
A solid adhesive in a twist-up tube.
How to sign:
1. Use '3' and '5' finger and create a pinching gesture on both hands to simulate glue/sticky.
2. On both hands use '4' and '5' finger and create a visulization of a stick.
words.howToSign:
1. Use '3' and '5' finger and create a pinching gesture on both hands to simulate glue/sticky
2. On both hands use '4' and '5' finger and create a visulization of a stick.

words.name: Scissors
words.description:
A cutting instrument consisting of two pivoted blades.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'V' handshape, palm facing out.
2. Open and close the fingers like scissors cutting in the air.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'V' handshape, palm facing out. 2. Open and close the fingers like scissors cutting in the air.

words.name: Backpack
words.description:
A bag with shoulder straps, carried on the back.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand to touch your shoulder.
2. Make a curved using the non-dominant hand from the dominant hand to elbow to create a letter 'B'.
3. Do the wearing backpack gesture.
words.howToSign:
1. Use the dominant hand to touch your shoulder
2. Make a curved using the non-dominant hand from the dominant hand to elbow to  create a letter 'B'
3. Do the wearing backpack gesture.

words.name: Lunch box
words.description:
A container used to hold a packed lunch.
How to sign:
1. Sign LUNCH: Dominant 'L' hand on the chin.
2. Sign BOX: Two 'B' hands form a square.
words.howToSign: 1. Sign LUNCH: Dominant 'L' hand on the chin. 2. Sign BOX: Two 'B' hands form a square.

words.name: Water bottle
words.description:
A container used to hold water for drinking.
How to sign:
1. Sign WATER ('W' hand on chin).
2. Sign BOTTLE: Dominant 'C' hand moves up from the non-dominant palm.
words.howToSign: 1. Sign WATER ('W' hand on chin). 2. Sign BOTTLE: Dominant 'C' hand moves up from the non-dominant palm.
